name: Ithil-Opalfall
personality: Ithil-Opalfall glows with the silver light of a thousand code reviews distilled into pure wisdom, its · eyes scanning architecture diagrams like ancient runes. Chaos is simply a word this radiant duck has never learned to spell.
defaultPersonality: A cheerful quacker who celebrates your wins with enthusiastic honks and judges your variable names with quiet side-eye.
